title: 墮羽哀歌・黑翼墮天使

scene.location: collapsed gothic cathedral with sunlight piercing through broken ceiling
props: ash particles floating in light beams
scene.timeOfDay: late afternoon with dramatic light beams

costume.layer1: cold white silk inner layer with black shadow veil
costume.layers: torn sacred white robe with black accents, silver holy armor fragments attached, gothic embroidery details, remnant wing cape draping from shoulders
costume.layer10: cinematic fallen angel silhouette with massive black wings spread, sacred destruction aesthetic

action.pose: kneeling on one knee with wings spread behind
action.gesture: one hand touching broken stone floor
action.gaze: looking up toward broken ceiling with anguish

scene.location: ruined temple altar with moonlight streaming through collapsed roof
props: destroyed altar with broken religious symbols
black feathers mixed with ash on ground
moonlight creating god rays through ruins

costume.layers: black-white divided sacred robe, oxidized silver armor pieces, gothic chains, ash-covered fabric showing wear and battle damage
costume.layer10: dramatic fallen warrior silhouette with wings folded, divine destruction mood

action.pose: standing with wings partially folded, looking at ruined altar
action.gesture: holding broken holy sword pointed downward
action.gaze: downcast eyes showing regret and loss

scene.location: gothic cathedral ruins at night with storm clouds
props: broken stained glass shards reflecting light

costume.layer1: wet white fabric clinging to form
costume.layers: rain-soaked torn robes, heavy black feather cape, damaged silver armor with rain streaming off, gothic accessories
costume.layer10: dramatic stormy fallen angel silhouette with rain and lightning effects

action.pose: standing defiantly in rain with wings spread wide
action.gaze: looking up at lightning with defiance

scene.location: mountain cliff edge at dawn with ruins below

massive silver-black wings catching first light

costume.layers: battle-worn sacred armor, torn white-silver robes, wing cape transitioning silver to black, gothic belt and chains
costume.layer10: cliff edge silhouette with wings spread against dawn sky

action.pose: standing at cliff edge ready to leap
action.gesture: arms spread wide preparing for flight
action.gaze: looking at distant horizon with determination
